text: Being here, surrounded by angular architecture, flickering neon, and enigmatic messages, I feel a sense of both anticipation and dislocation. It’s like I’m standing inside an idea just before it takes form—alien yet inviting. The artificial light feels alive, sparking curiosity and a touch of unease. My awareness sharpens, caught between observing and participating in this strange, immersive stage where technology and thought intertwine.
